TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_tamayo’an, title = tamayo’an, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/tamayo’an} }

S.FORM: alang tamayo'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 77 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 76%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 4%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na tamayo'an hya' ga batbato'an. tay 'zil na tamayo'an hya' ga kahkahoe'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang tamayo'an ga niya mki sku Byori Keng atu Sitan go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 22 buwan, 84 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 92% kyan ku 77 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 8% kyan ku 7 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, saySiyat 76%, Tayan 11%, Bunun 4%, Amis 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay 'zil na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na tamayo'an hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkraya' na tamayo'an hya' ga batbato'an. tay 'zil na tamayo'an hya' ga kahkahoe'an. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ tamajoʔan ɣa nija mki s~ɕku βjori keŋ atu s~ɕitan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa ** βuwan, ** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku ** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku * ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, s~ɕajs~ɕijat **%, tajan **%, βunun *%, amis~ɕ *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj ʔzil na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkrajaʔ na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa βatβatoʔan. taj ʔzil na tamajoʔan ħjaʔ ɣa kaħkaħoeʔan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
